description: Building-inspection protocol finding — modeled on the besiktning app's CaseDoc/Finding/SkickBedomning types (Swedish besiktningsprotokoll). One row = one finding (notering) within a protocol. Photo/vision transcription + PDF generation live in the besiktning app; the engine validates the finding rows.

condition.pattern_message: condition (skickbedömning) must be under_normalt, normalt, or over_normalt

ai_match_confidence.pattern_message: ai_match_confidence must be a float between 0 and 1

validated_by_user.pattern_message: validated_by_user must be true or false

photo_count.pattern_message: photo_count must be a non-negative integer
